name: Haddigan Rectangular Extendable Dining Table Dark Brown - Signature Design by Ashley
description: Take clean-lined, classic styling and touches of vintage inspiration. Top with a deep, complex finish for newfound sophistication. Now that's a look you can live with. Sporting a straightforward farmhouse profile, this dining room table easily accommodates guests thanks to a built-in butterfly leaf extension, so simple to operate. Details including rounded off corners add a gently worn, casual sense of charm.  Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
